typecheck.command: npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/client/tsconfig.json

blockingIssues.description: Viewer-role edit controls are not disabled across all views: Spreadsheet remains editable, Hierarchy retains drag/inline edit, Kanban drop triggers mutations, and OrgChart drag-to-reparent can still invoke move actions.
Department filter option is not applied in export logic; `ExportOptions.department` is collected in UI but never used to filter exported output.
Salary include/exclude toggle is non-functional because export hides only `[data-export-salary]` nodes and chart elements do not expose that marker.
Export captures the current React Flow viewport directly, so large/off-screen chart content can be clipped instead of exporting the full chart.
POST `/api/scheduled-changes/apply-due` is only auth-protected and lacks org/scenario role authorization checks.
`applyDueChanges` applies all pending changes globally without org/scenario scoping, enabling cross-org mutation risk.
Automatic application behavior is not implemented; due changes apply only via manual endpoint and do not auto-run when effective date arrives.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Explicitly require role-scoped authorization middleware for all mutating org/scenario endpoints (not auth-only), with examples for route review checklists.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `effective-date-scheduling` introduced a mutating apply-due route mounted with auth only, and controller logic applied global pending changes without org/scenario scope checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For option-driven user-facing features, require at least one behavior-level test per option path and one end-to-end semantic assertion (not only dialog wiring or filename/type checks).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `pdf-png-export` passed with tests that covered dialog callbacks and output type naming but missed core behavioral requirements (department filtering, salary exclusion, full-canvas capture).

rejectedObservations.observation: Update `.factory/library/architecture.md` to include invitation/member-role and scheduled-change modeling.
rejectedObservations.reason: deferred for orchestrator-level documentation pass; not applied in this scrutiny run to keep scope on validation gating and defect synthesis.
